query:
SELECT u.id, u.name, u.email, up.assignedBusinessLines, up.assignedTerritories, up.region
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN userProfiles up ON up.userId = u.id
WHERE u.name LIKE '%Brett%' OR u.name LIKE '%Dan Day%' OR u.name LIKE '%Daniel Day%'
ORDER BY u.name;
